data.body: Partially delivered: the 'enable remediation-mode novelty floor' half landed as ticket 70c8-423e-e4c1-4d86 (Gerrit 562, merged 2026-07-12 — both flags now default ON; flag removal is 49ae-258b-4534-4d83). REMAINING in this idea: the 'cap mandatory advisory load' half — whether the plan-review protocol should bound per-round mandatory remediation (e.g. only advisories above a priority floor, or top-N by priority), given the field data of ~13 advisories/round with 95% of remediation edits minting new findings. Evaluate AFTER the floors have soaked, since the rising floor may cut the advisory load enough on its own.
